HELLO THERE, I'M

Đỗ Công Minh

Creative Designer & Developer

I am a Software Engineering graduate seeking to grow in Frontend & UX/UI, starting from an internship role to apply my programming knowledge and interface design skills. I am eager to learn and contribute to real-world projects.

Let's TalkView WorkResume / CV

Clean & Intuitive

Eye Catching, Modern & Minimalist Design. Keep the UI clean with a modern touch without compromising UX.

Detail Oriented

Keen Eye for Spotting Small Details. Awareness to ease of access, UI consistency, and improved UX.

Fast & Optimized

Comprehensible and Optimized Code. Writing clean code is a top priority while keeping it as optimized as possible.
